scripts.dev: bun run services && turbo run dev
scripts.check:contracts: bun run generate:contracts && git diff --exit-code -- apps/api/openapi.json apps/web/src/lib/api/generated/schema.ts
scripts.generate:contracts: bun run --cwd apps/api generate:contracts && bun run --cwd apps/web generate:contracts
scripts.services:judge0: docker-compose up -d db redis && docker-compose up -d --force-recreate judge0-workers judge0-server
scripts.audit:errors: bun run --cwd apps/api audit:errors && bun run --cwd apps/web audit:errors
